name: Buttermilk Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature except for the water.
2. Place ingredients in the order listed into the bread machine pan.
3. Set the machine to the White Bread setting.
4. Check whether the dough is too wet or dry during the knead cycle.
5. If necessary, add a tablespoon of more water or flour to correct the consistency.
6. This recipe yields a dense loaf that is best toasted. Enjoy!
